temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman with dark, wet hair and a crazed, snarling expression lunges forward, brandishing a long knife. She wears a blue coat over a striped shirt. The scene is a chaotic, shaky-cam sequence, cutting between her menacing advance and a shot of a white bathroom sink. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a terrifying and violent confrontation, introducing a deranged and armed female antagonist.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, screeching sound effect accompanies the woman's lunge, followed by a tense, distorted musical score.)
(00:04-00:07) A man with a bloody gash on his forehead and a panicked, wide-eyed expression hides behind a doorway. He wears a plaid shirt under a red corduroy jacket. He looks terrified as he watches the woman with the knife. (Storyline: This segment introduces the protagonist, revealing he is injured and in a state of extreme fear, trapped and cornered by the woman.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, desperate. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, distorted music continues.)
